title: clusia guayanae
intro: Clusia guayanae is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae, commonly known as the Clusia or Yellow Guppy Tree. The plant's leaves and bark have been traditionally used in various cultures for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Clusia guayanae include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Clusia guayanae include tea infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
